query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "edit-compass & editreward-compass: a unified benchmark for image editi" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it provides a unified benchmark and evaluation framework for image editing, specifically focusing on the causal mechanisms (counterfactual generation) and metrics that are central to the user's interest in "Edit-Compass" and "EditReward-Compass." It establishes the empirical baseline and comparative context necessary for a literature review on benchmarking image editing systems.
